struct ParticlesSoA {
    x: Vec<f32>,
    y: Vec<f32>,
    z: Vec<f32>,
    vx: Vec<f32>,
    vy: Vec<f32>,
    vz: Vec<f32>,
    mass: Vec<f32>,
    charge: Vec<f32>,
    lifetime: Vec<f32>,
    active: Vec<bool>,
}

fn update_particles(p: &mut ParticlesSoA, dt: f32) {
    for i in 0..p.x.len() {
        p.x[i] += p.vx[i] * dt;
        p.y[i] += p.vy[i] * dt;
        p.z[i] += p.vz[i] * dt;
        let ax = p.charge[i] * 0.1 / p.mass[i];
        let ay = p.charge[i] * 0.1 / p.mass[i];
        let az = -9.8 / p.mass[i];
        p.vx[i] += ax * dt;
        p.vy[i] += ay * dt;
        p.vz[i] += az * dt;
        p.lifetime[i] -= dt;
        if p.lifetime[i] <= 0.0 {
            p.active[i] = false;
        }
    }
}

fn compute_energy(p: &ParticlesSoA) -> f32 {
    let mut total = 0.0f32;
    for i in 0..p.x.len() {
        let speed_sq = p.vx[i] * p.vx[i] + p.vy[i] * p.vy[i] + p.vz[i] * p.vz[i];
        total += 0.5 * p.mass[i] * speed_sq;
        total += p.charge[i] * p.x[i];
        total += p.charge[i] * p.y[i];
    }
    total
}
